title: BEZQ Car Fragrances One Million Inspired Car Air Freshener for Men Diffuser Scent Luxury Ornament Long Lasting (ONE MILL INSPIRED)
features: 🌬️ Creed-Inspired Fragrance - Bid farewell to unpleasant odors and welcome a refreshing, neutralized atmosphere with our Car Freshener, which features a blend of exceptional scent notes and gentle ingredients to help evoke an aura of opulence and refinement, transforming your car into a haven of fresh, masculine allure!

💪 Effective Odor Elimination - Engineered to combat the most stubborn odors, our car smell air freshener goes beyond the ordinary. Whether it's lingering food smells, pet odors, or any other potent scents, our product is up to the challenge, leaving your car smelling clean and inviting!

⚡ Stylish Design - The car perfume air freshener is not just a necessity but also a statement piece. Designed with a modern aesthetic, it adds a touch of sophistication to your car's interior. The sleek and discreet design seamlessly integrates into any vehicle's décor!

😊 Versatile Placement - While perfect for your car, this car scents air freshener isn't limited to automotive use. Bring the same invigorating scents to your room, office, home, or any other personal space. Versatility meets convenience for the modern man on the go!

🔥Long Lasting Fragrance – Enjoy a long-lasting freshness that goes beyond the ordinary. Our car air fresheners for men are designed to provide months of continuous fragrance, ensuring that your vehicle remains a pleasant haven during every drive!

Terms & Conditions: Make sure your cork is screwed on tightly and sitting level (not cross threaded) after removing the plastic cap. Position the plastic ball on your rope centrally to avoid and reduce the bottle from swinging. Once your cork is fully soaked through (Dark in colour and damp to touch) remove from your vehicle immediately. Do not unscrew your cork after it has been soaked. Keep liquids away from skin & clothes
